what_it_does: This file is a channel-memory attachment ledger entry that records an image attachment in the design-source channel, linking attachment id att-df89df4f to the image asset at image://design-source/capital-raise/p-23 and storing its addition timestamp.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter with no body content.
target uses an image:// URI pointing to design-source/capital-raise/p-23.
No code symbols, captions, or provenance details are present.
standouts: References a specific image asset p-23 under the capital-raise path in the design-source channel.
Attachment id att-df89df4f is explicitly declared.
Minimal metadata-only record with a timestamped target pointer.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
Fields include id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added.
Target uses a custom image:// URI scheme to locate the asset.
concerns: No caption, alt text, or description of the image content.
No uploader, author, or provenance metadata.
The image:// target cannot be verified or resolved from this file alone.
notes: A design-source channel attachment record that points attachment att-df89df4f to image p-23 in the capital-raise folder, created on 2026-06-22.
questions: What visual content does image p-23 contain?
Who added this attachment and why?
Is image://design-source/capital-raise/p-23 resolvable by the system?
How does this attachment relate to a specific page or design artifact?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record an image attachment reference, and the file does exactly that with a target URI and timestamp.
intention_signals: It appears to create a durable, queryable link between an attachment identifier and a specific image asset in the design-source channel for later retrieval or audit.
novelty: The use of an image:// URI scheme as the attachment target and the extreme minimalism of the record are the most distinctive aspects.
contribution: Provides a stable attachment identifier (att-df89df4f) mapped to a concrete image asset location (design-source/capital-raise/p-23) with a creation timestamp, which a fused system could use for asset lookup and lineage.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a channel-memory attachment record (att-df89df4f) of type images in the design-source channel targeting image://design-source/capital-raise/p-23 and timestamped 2026-06-22T11:30:59Z.
intention_for_embedding: Record an image attachment reference for a capital-raise design asset so it can be retrieved or audited by attachment id.
